name: Puppet Strike
flavor: The wire goes taut, and a body that was never truly its own snaps forward or slams down like a puppet dropped mid-scene.
description: You wrench hard on a String already fixed to a creature you can see within range, forcing its own limbs to whip against itself. The target makes a Strength saving throw against your {{trick save DC|8 + proficiency bonus + your trick ability modifier}}. On a failure, it takes [[2d6]] physical damage and is knocked prone. On a success, it takes half as much damage and stays standing. You must already have a String attached to the target to use this trick.
sheetSummary: Action, 60 ft, cooldown 2. Requires a String already on the target. Str save vs trick save DC. Fail: [[2d6]] physical, prone. Success: half damage only.
